name: Old Fashioned Butterscotch Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt the butter and stir in the brown sugar until well combined.
2. Add the egg and vanilla extract, mixing thoroughly.
3. Pour in the milk, then gradually add the flour, salt, and baking powder, stirring until a dough forms.
4. Spoon teaspoon-sized portions of dough onto a greased cookie sheet, spacing them about one inch apart.
5. Bake for 8 minutes at 375°F (190°C), or until lightly browned.
